author: ahamlat

author: ahamlat
content:
I recommend to not use jq as it can affect your testing environment. It gets OOM killed even with smaller json outputs.
```
[214768.325661] Out of memory: Killed process 28957 (jq) total-vm:20703436kB, anon-rss:20430816kB, file-rss:1768kB, shmem-rss:0kB, UID:0 pgtables:40560kB
```

author: ahamlat
content: With this block, even with an excellent network throughput, 80 Gbps to simplify (i.e 10 GiB/s), it will take more than 60 seconds to stream the response. This changes the way we design timeouts on RPC load. We had to create a specific timeout for this case (debugTraceBlock)
